name: York
title: Two thousand years in an afternoon
note: Pictures for the big-picture opening: the Minster and the medieval walls of a city layered with Roman, Viking and medieval history.

items.caption: York Minster, one of the greatest medieval cathedrals in northern Europe. York lets you walk through two thousand years, Roman, Viking and medieval, in a single afternoon.
items.kidcaption: The enormous York Minster. York is like a time machine: Romans, Vikings, and medieval knights all left their mark on this one small city.

items.caption: York's medieval walls, the most complete of any English city. Because York's importance faded, it was preserved rather than knocked down, leaving it wonderfully whole.
items.kidcaption: You can walk almost all the way around York on top of its old stone walls, more complete than any other city in England.
